dialogue.line: So BF, you're the punk who thinks he's got what it takes to the next big thing, huh?
Well let me tell you something brother...
You're no Snoop Dog, you're no NF AAANNNNDDD you're certainly no Eminem!
Do you really think you've got what it takes to make it in MY industry??
And step up to the 10 time, multi-platinum record, grammy award winner, such as the illustrious, Daddy Dearest!?
First of all.
That pose looks gayer than Pico.
Second of all.
I don't give a flying FUCK.
Third of all.
Are you done tiring yourself out with useless dance moves?
Or do you still need to practice for your ballet recital?
Okay, fuck you then.
You talk all this smack like you're the best there is at what you do.
But that doesn't mean a damn thing to this man. If ya wanna take a swing at the king, then you better come prepared boy, because I'm about to rock you...
Musical puns won't save your worn out career pops. It's time for you to kneel down before your true king!
I only kneel before my wife.
Nevermind that.
Now pull that mic out and let's rock this joint!
Bring it on grandpa! Let's see if you still got the skills to pay the bills!
Or if you're time in the spotlight is about to die out like an introvert at a rave party.
What the hell does that mean?
Bitch just sing the damn song already.
